name: Short-Form Market Research Brain
description: Your AI agent's brain for short-form video market research. Tap into real-time social intelligence across TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Instagram Reels — track viral content, discover rising creators, monitor hashtag performance, analyze trends, and get AI-generated niche reports. Powered by the Virlo API.
tagline: Real-time social intelligence across TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Instagram Reels
